programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: (M) A man agrees to take a job as the "live-in" manservant to a wealthy businesswoman. He then realizes he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: (M) Lauren finds romance with Mark aboard a luxury yacht, but the affair turns dark when his fiancee mysteriously vanishes at sea.

programme.title: Girl In The Attic
programme.desc: (M) Obsessed Billy abducts runner Kelsey and hides her in his attic. When his mother discovers her captive, the two women must band together to survive his control.

programme.title: Unforgettable Christmas
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
